title: knautia arvensis subsp. pseudolongifolia
intro: Knautia arvensis subsp. pseudolongifolia, also known as field scabious, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Dipsacaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of Knautia arvensis subsp. pseudolongifolia include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
